title: デビュー戦の後に・レースって最高！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While basking in the thrill of racing, she sets her
sights on the race that will decide the junior
champion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal is decided—as the first major step
towards her dream, she locks her crosshairs on the
Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes!
